findings.title: Sticky header z-index uses magic numbers without a layered system
Inline `style={{ width, height }}` for tiny dots is widespread drift from Tailwind tokens
Color values bypass the design-token system via inline `style` and `var(--…)` arbitrary values
Inline `onMouseEnter`/`onMouseLeave` background swaps for a button instead of `:hover`
Tooltip arrow border edge appears chipped due to `rotate-45` on a single-side-bordered square
`RecommendedNextBanner` rebuilds the same hover-tooltip pattern that `ContextHealthBadge` already implements
Toast notification uses `absolute` positioning that breaks on small or non-positioned parents
Quick Actions toggle button uses `display: none` via inline style instead of conditional render
`MiniProgressArc` is hard-coded to amber instead of taking the module accent
`knowledgeTips` data slot exists registry-wide but only one shape consumes it
findings.file: src/lib/module-registry.ts:432-554 (and ~12 more empty arrays); consumed only at src/components/modules/ModuleShell.tsx:122-142

findings.title: Two incompatible module shells coexist with divergent registry-driven UI
`RecommendedNextBanner` collapses three distinct registry signals into one cramped strip
`MiniProgressArc` and `ContextHealthBadge` dot encode the same idea with hand-rolled inline geometry
Tab system treats all registry-driven content as full-height except Overview/Roadmap, leaking layout math
Toast and Quick-Actions toggle hard-code z-index ordering and use absolute/fixed inconsistently
`getChecklistSizes()` rebuilds a registry-wide dictionary on every banner mount
Two parallel radar/gauge implementations diverge in style and capability
Hard-coded hex colors leak into "polished" data files, bypassing chart-colors tokens
SaveDataSchema/AttributePointOptimizer "design.tsx" files are pure re-exports — a non-feature
CircularGauge variants diverge in "status badge" treatment and label casing
Missing empty/loading/error states across data panels
ZoneMap topology lock icon is a literal emoji embedded in SVG `<text>`
Magic-number radar/topology coordinates and bespoke padding leak into render code
DiffViewer uses raw `border-slate-700/50` while the rest of the file uses tokens
Two SVG-graph editors implement node/wire/pin primitives independently with subtly different visual rules
Code-output panel chrome is hand-rolled with hardcoded `#0d1117`/`#0a0a15` four times
Tab-pill button is reimplemented inline in three editors with the same structure
Tag concatenation `${color}${OPACITY_X}` mixed with `withOpacity(color, OPACITY_X)` in the same file
`XpSourceBreakdown` renders the bar label twice, overlapping the percentage label
Tag-rule SVG visualization uses a fixed `380` viewBox while the editor below is responsive
Per-editor bespoke chrome (column headers, intro text, stat strip) instead of a panel-frame primitive
Form-input styling string duplicated across every editor with no `<NumberField>` component
Rarity colour scale forks across three sibling tabs
EconomySimulatorView bypasses the chart-colors token system entirely
Three different chart axis/grid implementations across the four visualizers
AffixCraftingWorkbench has two divergent definitions of category colour
TraitSlider is a bespoke range-input rebuild that won't compose with the rest of the slider surface
Hard-coded SVG dimensions break responsive at small viewports
Drop Simulator chip row will wrap awkwardly because chips have no min/max width policy
RollResultCard composes its own border + corner-bracket shell instead of a hover-only Card primitive
Rarity stat row "Avg per 100 kills" loses precision but copies the rate cell verbatim
CombatSimulatorView lives in a parallel design system from every other sim in this context
StatInput exists but the same pattern is reimplemented inline ~17 times across the context
Three nearly-identical SVG hover-tooltip charts diverge in tooltip chrome and styling
RatingBadge's pattern is duplicated as Badge variants and as inline severity pills
SensitivityChart skips empty-state rendering during the first frame, causing a layout pop
SurvivalHeatmap cells skip cell-level keyboard focus and ARIA semantics
SpatialGrid and the GAS sliders both color-code by stat but the palettes don't match
FlowNode hardcodes a 44-char label truncation instead of using CSS
Two parallel "category-grouped collapsible parameter list" components drift apart
Hard-coded character hex colours bypass the design-system token registry
PropertyInspector slider max is computed from the row's own value, so the thumb never reaches the right edge
CharacterScalingPreview is missing a marker on the NeonBar showing where the current level sits
Comparison rows in ComparisonRow.tsx render two stacked bars in one track that obscure each other

PresetCard hover scale clips inside the parent grid cell because parent does not define `overflow-visible`
NarrativeBreadcrumb in CharacterBlueprint uses inline `style={{ fontWeight, opacity }}` instead of state classes — diverges from the SubTabNavigation pattern below it
Many tabular layouts in this context use `w-12`, `w-14`, `w-20`, `w-28` width prescriptions that do not survive narrow viewports
Section header chrome forked into two divergent variants across 10 panels

findings.title: WizardButton variants don't cover the wizard's most prominent buttons — primary/destructive coverage gap
Inline `style={{}}` color drift in TestHarnessPanel and BlueprintInspector — abandons Tailwind layer entirely
PathBrowser is a 480-line god-component mixing data fetching, navigation, and four list flavors
`text-2xs` used inconsistently — defined locally, not part of the design system
Chat overlay chrome reinvents SurfaceCard at level 3
SlashCommandMenu styled in CSS file while siblings use Tailwind utilities
Workflow node status palette diverges from chart-color tokens
Module tag selector reimplements a chip/pill component inline
Title-bar drag handle has no keyboard or focus affordance
ChatMessages auto-scroll runs on every length change with no "user scrolled up" detection
ChatInput textarea height ceiling and Send button affordance are off-system
Magic z-index 9000 and ad-hoc edge margin in overlay layer
Three card primitives (ErrorCard, BuildSummaryCard, WarningAggregator) reimplement the same scaffold three different ways
CLI_COLORS Tailwind classes interpolated into `hover:` and `disabled:hover:` produce broken selectors at build time
Magic-number sizing on textarea and resize handle drifts from the design-system spacing scale
Empty state and prompt-suggestion chips duplicate ChipButton scaffolding three times in the same module
Inline `style={{ color: ... }}` for icon tinting bypasses the theme in ~25 places, blocking theme switching
Streaming/idle state indicator is rendered three different ways across header, output footer, and InlineTerminal header
Suggestion-chip dismiss state has 3 phases ('visible' / 'pending-undo' / 'dismissed') but only 2 visible UI states; missing announcement of the auto-expire countdown
Selection toolbar position math has no viewport-edge clamping on the right side or below the visible scroll container
Button has no `disabled` styling, no `loading` state, no `icon` slot, and missing semantic variants — consumers fork it as `WizardButton`
`Tooltip` has no keyboard/focus support, no escape-to-dismiss, no portal, no positioning logic, and no role attributes
`motion.ts` ships four overlapping motion-config systems — DURATION, SPRING, MOTION_CONFIG, ANIMATION_PRESETS — with conflicting numbers
Hierarchy of card primitives is unclear: `Card` is a thin re-export, `SurfaceCard` is the real one, no headed `Card.Header/.Body/.Footer` slots
`chart-colors.ts` opacity tokens are inconsistent in granularity and have a footgun: numeric label != actual percent
`Badge` is missing `info`, `neutral`, `subtle`, and `live` variants — and has no size/intent props, forcing inline style overrides
`InteractivePill` and `MultiInteractivePill` have weak a11y: no `role="tablist"/"tab"`, no `aria-pressed`, no keyboard arrow navigation, and no focus-visible ring
`MarkdownProse` uses unsanitized regex-based markdown→HTML and renders via `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
`EmptyState` action API is closed over `{label, onClick, color}` — no support for icons, loading, or disabled, and no destructive intent
`GradientText` defaults force `font-bold` and have no `prefers-reduced-transparency` consideration; `as` enum is fixed
Module Renderer has no Suspense/skeleton boundary — every module fends for itself
SidebarL1 active indicator math is fragile and uses hard-coded magic numbers
CLI tab "active" border-top adds 2px and shifts non-active tabs vertically
Activity Feed "Read all" and dismiss buttons lack visible focus rings
EventBusDevTools panel ignores `useReducedMotion` and uses a spring slide

Welcome / "Select a category" empty state is a bare `

` — no shell-grade treatment
Top-bar `h-11` vs sidebar L2 header `py-3` produce a half-pixel header alignment drift
SearchTrigger dispatches a synthetic Ctrl+K KeyboardEvent instead of toggling state directly
ModuleErrorBoundary "Retry" button bypasses the standard focus-ring style and renders edge-to-edge inside the boundary
ResizeHandle (CLI bottom panel) ships a hard-coded `boxShadow` and isn't keyboard-resizable
Score-ring SVG geometry duplicated three times with magic numbers
Finding row primitive reimplemented across SessionDetail and FindingsExplorer with diverging affordances
Empty-state illustration block copy-pasted five times verbatim
Status-pill color treatment reimplemented inconsistently between status maps
Three independent tab-bar implementations with `layoutId`-collision risk
StatCard duplicated with subtly different layout between Overview and Regression
Confidence shown as bare percent with no visual weight
NewSessionPanel "Aggressive" toggle is a button not a switch
Two more local `StatCard` forks reinforce the suite-wide KPI drift
Local `MODULE_COLORS.setup` / `content` / `evaluator` mapping for "good/fair/bad" is wrong-semantic and forks the threshold ramp four ways
Tailwind arbitrary-value class `bg-[${STATUS_WARNING}${OPACITY_10}]` does not work — the badge background is invisible
Sub-tab and stat icons are not interactive even though the visual treatment hints they are
The streak section uses tabular-nums and a divider that don't match the Module Activity row's number formatting
Daily-activity tooltip loses its "darker than surface" backdrop in light mode (hard-coded `bg-[#1a1a24]`)
The PNG-export canvas renderer is a maintenance trap — a parallel rendering of the same data with no shared layout source
